B2C Campaign - NotebookLM Prompt

NotebookLM prompt for generating the HeyZack B2C crowdfunding campaign deck

NotebookLM Prompt: HeyZack B2C Crowdfunding Deck

Instructions for NotebookLM

Create a 12-slide crowdfunding campaign presentation for HeyZack, an AI-powered smart home system. The presentation should be warm, approachable, and emotionally compelling for consumer audiences.

Brand Styling Requirements

Colors (use consistently throughout):

  • Primary Blue: #243984 — Trust, reliability, security features
  • Primary Pink: #E82F89 — Excitement, CTAs, emotion moments
  • Gradient: Blue to Pink — Title slide, closing slide, key CTAs
  • Background: White or light grey with lifestyle imagery

Typography:

  • Headlines: Bold, friendly sans-serif, 48-64px
  • Body: Warm, readable, 18-24px
  • CTAs: Bold, uppercase, button styling

Visual Style:

  • Lifestyle photography (real homes, real people)
  • Warm, inviting lighting
  • Products shown in natural settings
  • Diverse, inclusive representation
  • Emotional storytelling over technical specs

Slide-by-Slide Content

SLIDE 1: Title

Headline: Your Home. Just Smarter. Subhead: AI-Powered Smart Home for Everyone Visual: Beautiful living room with smart devices subtly visible CTA Badge: “Join the Revolution” Logo: Centered with subtle glow

SLIDE 2: The Problem

Headline: Smart Homes Shouldn’t Be Complicated

Pain Points (display as 3 cards):

  1. Multiple apps — Every device needs its own app
  2. Confusing setup — Hours of frustration, maybe an electrician
  3. High cost, low value — Expensive systems that don’t save money

Visual: Person juggling multiple phone apps, frustrated expression

SLIDE 3: Meet the Homeowners

Headline: Built for People Like You

Tyler (Tech-Savvy Tyler):

  • Age: 28-35
  • Urban professional
  • “I want cutting-edge tech that just works”

Emma (Energy-Conscious Emma):

  • Age: 35-50
  • Suburban homeowner
  • “I care about savings and sustainability”

Visual: Lifestyle photos of both personas

SLIDE 4: The Solution

Headline: Introducing HeyZack AI Home

3 Key Benefits:

  1. One App for Everything — All 128 devices, one simple interface
  2. AI That Learns — Your home adapts to your lifestyle
  3. Works Together — Devices communicate automatically

Visual: Product ecosystem hero shot with app interface

SLIDE 5: How It Works

Headline: Setup in Minutes. Smart Forever.

3-Step Process:

  1. Plug & Play — DIY installation, no electrician needed
  2. Connect — Download app, add devices in seconds
  3. Relax — AI learns your patterns, optimizes everything

Visual: Simple icons for each step, connected by arrows

SLIDE 6: Product Range

Headline: 128 Products. Endless Possibilities.

Categories with Starting Prices:

CategoryProductsStarting At
Lighting18$29
Climate14$49
Security19$79
Sensors13$19
Curtains29$89
Energy12$39

Visual: Clean product grid with category icons

SLIDE 7: AI Features

Headline: AI That Actually Helps

Real Intelligence (not rules, not schedules):

  • 🌅 Learns when you wake up, adjusts temperature perfectly
  • 🔐 Detects when you leave, automatically secures your home
  • ⚡ Optimizes energy usage, cuts bills 20-30%

Callout: “Average savings: $100-150/month”

Visual: App interface showing AI learning patterns

SLIDE 8: Tyler’s Story

Headline: “Tech That Just Works Together”

Quote:

“I’ve tried every smart home system out there. Ring, Nest, Philips, you name it. HeyZack is the first one where everything just… works together.”

Results:

  • 45 devices connected in one weekend
  • Zero additional hubs needed
  • One app controls everything

Attribution: Tyler, Austin TX Visual: Modern apartment with tech-forward styling

SLIDE 9: Emma’s Story

Headline: “Savings That Make Sense”

Quote:

“I was spending $400/month on energy. Now it’s $280. HeyZack paid for itself in 3 months. I wish I’d found this years ago.”

Results:

  • $120/month in energy savings
  • 3-month payback period
  • Peace of mind knowing home is optimized

Attribution: Emma, Portland OR Visual: Family home, warm and welcoming atmosphere

SLIDE 10: Backer Rewards

Headline: Exclusive Kickstarter Pricing

Reward Tiers:

TierBacker PriceRetail ValueIncludes
Starter Kit$149$1995 devices, 1 gateway, app
Home Kit$349$49915 devices, 2 gateways, AI
Whole Home$699$99930 devices, 4 gateways, premium

Savings Badge: “30% OFF — Kickstarter Exclusive”

SLIDE 11: Social Proof

Headline: Join Thousands of Smart Homeowners

Trust Metrics:

  • ⭐ 4.8/5 — App Store rating
  • 10,000+ — Happy customers
  • 128 — Products in ecosystem
  • 🌍 16 — Languages supported

Press (placeholder): Featured in TechCrunch, The Verge, Wired

Visual: Customer photo grid or testimonial carousel

SLIDE 12: Call to Action

Headline: Make Your Home Smarter Today

Subhead: Back us on Kickstarter and save 30%

CTA Button: BACK THIS PROJECT

URL: kickstarter.com/heyzack

Visual: Gradient background (blue to pink) with product family Logo: White version, centered at bottom

Formatting Rules

  1. Lead with emotion — Benefits before features
  2. Use real stories — Tyler and Emma make it relatable
  3. Show, don’t tell — Lifestyle imagery over product specs
  4. Clear CTAs — Every slide should have a next step implied
  5. Accessible language — No jargon, no tech-speak

Tone & Voice

  • Warm and Friendly — Like a helpful neighbor
  • Aspirational — The home you’ve always wanted
  • Trustworthy — Real people, real savings
  • Exciting — This is the future, and it’s available now
